basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi has released the official notification for 1 Chief Executive Officer (CEO) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years Age relaxation may be relaxed for deserving applicants as per the institute or GoI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: P.G. degree in the field of science/technology/engineering/additive manufacturing/or equivalent, Ph.D. or equivalent
qualification.details: P.G. degree in the field of science/technology/engineering/additive manufacturing/or equivalent or Ph.D. or equivalent with 5-15 years experience as per designation.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Chief Executive Officer (CEO) (Senior Consultant/Senior Project Coordinator/Lead Scientist)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Chief Executive Officer (CEO) (Senior Consultant/Senior Project Coordinator/Lead Scientist)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Mandi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Chief Executive Officer (CEO) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi CEO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the CEO post?
faq.answer: A Post Graduate degree in science, technology, engineering, or additive manufacturing, or a Ph.D. or equivalent is required, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Executive Officer position is 55 years. Age relaxation may be provided for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the CEO role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 100,000 to Rs. 150,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email with all required documents attached. Please refer to the 'How to Apply' section for detailed instructions.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Chief Executive Officer position?
faq.answer: The selection process for this role will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at IIT Mandi.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Mandi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi is located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 175075.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification is for IIT Mandi, located in Himachal Pradesh. Candidates from all eligible backgrounds are encouraged to apply, provided they meet the specified criteria.
